allow: Bash(cd /c/Project/myloa && echo "SELECT \\"raidId\\", difficulty, COUNT\(*\) FROM \\"CharacterRaid\\" WHERE \\"raidId\\" = 'egir-ex' GROUP BY \\"raidId\\", difficulty;" | npx prisma db execute --stdin 2>&1)
